# Vendored feature-select-v2

This directory contains the runtime code required by the modeling agent's
feature-screening scripts.

Source snapshot:

- Original local source: feature-select-v2 `scripts/code`
- Vendored path: `vendor/feature-select-v2/scripts/code`

The code is treated as a stable runtime dependency for this repository. Prefer
adding adapter code in project scripts instead of editing the core screening
implementation.
